response.global_analysis:
1. Reference Lyrics Discrepancy: The reference lyrics provided 'Fansa' by HoneyWorks, but the audio actually plays the Hololive 3rd Generation original song 'Kyururun Daisakusen' (きゅるるん大作戦), which borrows elements from 'Fansa'.
2. Reference Usage: Discarded the reference song and transcribed the correct lyrics manually to match the vocal track precisely.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are tightly anchored to the fast-paced vocals with seamless transitions to avoid cascading delays.

subtitles.original: アイアイアイアイ あいらぶゆー！
subtitles.english: Ai, ai, ai, ai, I love you!

subtitles.original: 好きになった？愛しちゃって！
subtitles.english: Did you fall in love? Love me!

subtitles.original: 夢見るハートが ぴょんぴょんぴょん
subtitles.english: My dreaming heart goes hop, hop, hop!

subtitles.original: アナタに落ちて あびゃあびゃあびゃ
subtitles.english: Falling for you... oh my, oh my!
Even if I end up like this,

subtitles.original: どうしたもんかの ぬいぬいぬい
subtitles.english: What should I do? Nui, nui, nui!

subtitles.original: 助けて君的 あほいほいほい
もっと もっと もっと もっと
好きになった？愛してね！
subtitles.english: Did you fall in love? Please love me!
